name: 7-habits
description: Stephen Covey's The 7 Habits of Highly Effective People — principle-centered living from personal effectiveness to interdependent leadership
useCase: Developers and AI agents can use this skill to help users develop personal effectiveness, set life goals, manage time, build relationships, resolve conflicts, collaborate creatively, and maintain renewal.
knownRisks: Covey's framework requires genuine internal commitment — superficial application won't produce results
Some concepts (like Personal Mission Statement) may feel abstract without guided practice
